title: sorbus folgneri
intro: Sorbus folgneri, also known as the Folgner's whitebeam, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is native to the Himalayas and is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Sorbus folgneri can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
